title: Office of Communications and Public Liaison | National Institutes of Health (NIH)
content: List of Institutes and Centers NIH Office of the Director Office of the Principal Deputy Director Administration and Services Office of Communications and Public Liaison Public Affairs Public Information Freedom of Information Act Office Contact OCPL Clear Communication Office of Legislative Policy and Analysis (OLPA) Office of Management Assessment (OMA) Executive Secretariat (ExecSec) Science Policy Research, Funding and Coordination Directors of NIH Institutes and Centers Office of Communications and Public Liaison The Office of Communications and Public Liaison (OCPL) oversees communications on NIH programs and activities to the public, the media, and stakeholder communities. Located in the Office of the Director, OCPL coordinates its activities with communication offices in the NIH’s 27 Institutes and Centers . OCPL Leadership Amanda Fine Deputy Director for Public Affairs, Office of Communications and Public Liaison Chief (Acting), Strategic Communications and Media Relations Branch Scott Prince Deputy Director for Public Information, Office of Communications and Public Liaison Amy Blackburn Chief, Special Events and Visits Branch Karen Lampe Chief (Acting), NIH Freedom of Information Act Office Dana Talesnik Chief, Staff News and Public Inquiries Branch Denean Standing-Ojo Chief, Digital Communications Branch Harrison Wein Chief, Health and Science Publications Branch Emma Wojtowicz Chief, Internal Communications Branch Resources Health Information NIH All Staff NIH Only NIH Director’s page NIH Employee Intranet NIH Only NIH News & Events NIH News in Health NIH PIO network NIH Research Matters NIH Style Guide Pregúntele a Carla Salud NIH Social Media Your Healthiest Self: Wellness Toolkits Social Media @NIH @NIHDirector NIH Facebook Flickr Instagram This page last reviewed on February 13, 2026
